testCases.name: test_case_0
testCases.input: What is the return window for electronics purchased on ShopEasy?
testCases.actualOutput: The return window for electronics purchased on ShopEasy is 10 days from the date of delivery, provided they are unused and in their original packaging.
testCases.expectedOutput: Electronics purchased on ShopEasy have a 7-day return window from the date of delivery.
retrievalContext:
[Source: Returns and Refunds Policy]
2. Return Window
The return window begins from the date of delivery as recorded in the order tracking system.
Different product categories have different return windows:
Product Category
Return Window
Condition
Electronics & Mobiles
10 days
Unused, original packaging
Clothing, Shoes & Accessories
30 days
Unworn, tags intact
Books & Stationery
10 days
Undamaged
Large Appliances
10 days
Defective/damaged only
Grocery & Perishables
2 days
Damaged/wrong item only
Jewellery & Watches
10 days
Unused, original packaging
Furniture & Home Decor
10 days
Damaged/defective only
Toys & Baby Products
10 days
Unused, original packaging

[Source: Returns and Refunds Policy]
1. Overview
ShopEasy offers a hassle-free returns and refunds program designed to ensure complete customer
satisfaction. This policy applies to all items purchased directly from ShopEasy.in or from third-party
sellers fulfilled by ShopEasy (SFE). Items sold and fulfilled by third-party sellers may have separate
return policies.

[Source: Returns and Refunds Policy]
6. Refund Process
Once the returned item is received and inspected, the refund will be processed as follows:
Refund Method
Timeframe
Notes
ShopEasy Pay Balance
2–3 business days
Fastest option
Original Credit/Debit Card
5–7 business days
Bank processing times apply
Net Banking / UPI
5–7 business days
Subject to bank timelines
EMI / BNPL
7–10 business days
EMI cancellation applies
Gift Card / Voucher
2–3 business days
Credited to account balance

testCases.name: test_case_1
testCases.input: Which items are non-returnable on ShopEasy?
testCases.actualOutput:
The following items are non-returnable on ShopEasy:

- Digital products, software licenses, and downloadable content.
- Hazardous materials and items with safety seals broken.
- Perishable goods beyond the 2-day window.
- Customised or personalised products.
- Items explicitly marked as non-returnable on the product listing.
- Underwear, lingerie, and swimwear for hygiene reasons.
testCases.expectedOutput: Non-returnable items on ShopEasy include perishable goods, digital products after download, personalised or customised items, hygiene products once opened (such as innerwear and swimwear), and hazardous materials.
retrievalContext:
[Source: Returns and Refunds Policy]
4. Non-Returnable Items
The following items are not eligible for return:
 Digital products, software licenses, and downloadable content.
 Hazardous materials and items with safety seals broken.
 Perishable goods beyond the 2-day window.
 Customised or personalised products.
 Items explicitly marked as non-returnable on the product listing.
 Underwear, lingerie, and swimwear for hygiene reasons.

[Source: Returns and Refunds Policy]
1. Overview
ShopEasy offers a hassle-free returns and refunds program designed to ensure complete customer
satisfaction. This policy applies to all items purchased directly from ShopEasy.in or from third-party
sellers fulfilled by ShopEasy (SFE). Items sold and fulfilled by third-party sellers may have separate
return policies.

[Source: Shipping and Delivery Policy]
8. Undeliverable Items
Certain items cannot be shipped to specific locations due to legal restrictions, carrier limitations, or
hazardous material regulations. These include:
 Flammable or explosive materials.
 Certain batteries and electronic devices to remote areas.
 Items restricted by state or local regulations.
9. International Shipping
ShopEasy currently does not support outbound international shipping for domestic orders. For
international deliveries, customers are directed to ShopEasy Global Store. Import duties and taxes
for items from ShopEasy Global Store are the responsibility of the buyer.

testCases.name: test_case_2
testCases.input: What is the free shipping threshold on ShopEasy?
testCases.actualOutput: The free shipping threshold on ShopEasy is for orders above Rs. 499.
testCases.expectedOutput: ShopEasy offers free shipping on orders above Rs. 499. Orders below Rs. 499 attract a shipping fee of Rs. 40.
retrievalContext:
[Source: Shipping and Delivery Policy]
3. Shipping Fees
Shipping fee structures are as follows:
 Orders above ■499: FREE standard delivery.
 Orders below ■499: ■40 shipping fee applies.
 Expedited delivery: Additional charges apply based on item weight and destination.
 Large items (appliances, furniture): Fixed delivery fee of ■99–■499 depending on item.
4. Delivery Coverage
ShopEasy delivers to over 100% of serviceable pin codes across India. Delivery availability depends
on the seller's shipping settings and the delivery partner's coverage in that area. You can check
delivery availability on the product page by entering your pin code.

[Source: Shipping and Delivery Policy]
1. Overview
ShopEasy provides reliable shipping and delivery services across India through its logistics network
ShopEasy Logistics and third-party courier partners. This policy outlines delivery timelines, shipping
fees, and related terms.
2. Delivery Timelines
Delivery Type
Estimated Time
Eligibility
Same-Day Delivery
Same day
Select pin codes, order before 9 AM
Next-Day Delivery
Next business day
Select items and locations
Standard Delivery
3–5 business days
All customers
Economy Delivery
6–8 business days
Remote areas
Scheduled Delivery
Customer chosen date
Large appliances & furniture

[Source: Payments and Pricing Policy]
5. Pricing Policy
Prices on ShopEasy are set by sellers and may change at any time. The price charged is the price
displayed at the time of order placement. ShopEasy participates in price matching on select
products. All prices are inclusive of applicable GST unless stated otherwise.
6. Price Errors
In the event of a pricing error, ShopEasy reserves the right to cancel the order and issue a full
refund. Customers will be notified via email within 24 hours of order cancellation due to a pricing
error.

testCases.name: test_case_3
testCases.input: What happens if a ShopEasy delivery attempt fails?
testCases.actualOutput: If a ShopEasy delivery attempt fails, the company will make up to 3 delivery attempts on consecutive business days. After 3 failed attempts, the package will be returned to the seller, and a refund will be initiated. If you need to reschedule delivery, you can contact customer support or update your delivery instructions in the app.
testCases.expectedOutput: ShopEasy makes up to 3 delivery attempts. If all three attempts fail, the package is returned to the seller and a refund is initiated.
retrievalContext:
[Source: Shipping and Delivery Policy]
6. Failed Delivery Attempts
If a delivery attempt fails, ShopEasy will make up to 3 delivery attempts on consecutive business
days. After 3 failed attempts, the package will be returned to the seller and a refund will be initiated.
To reschedule delivery, contact customer support or update your delivery instructions in the app.
7. Delivery to Alternate Address
Customers can add multiple delivery addresses to their ShopEasy account. You may also update
the delivery address after placing an order, provided the order has not yet been dispatched. Address
changes are not possible once the item is out for delivery.

[Source: Shipping and Delivery Policy]
1. Overview
ShopEasy provides reliable shipping and delivery services across India through its logistics network
ShopEasy Logistics and third-party courier partners. This policy outlines delivery timelines, shipping
fees, and related terms.
2. Delivery Timelines
Delivery Type
Estimated Time
Eligibility
Same-Day Delivery
Same day
Select pin codes, order before 9 AM
Next-Day Delivery
Next business day
Select items and locations
Standard Delivery
3–5 business days
All customers
Economy Delivery
6–8 business days
Remote areas
Scheduled Delivery
Customer chosen date
Large appliances & furniture

[Source: Payments and Pricing Policy]
8. Failed Payments
If a payment fails but the amount is debited from your account, it will be automatically reversed
within 5–7 business days by your bank. ShopEasy does not hold failed payment amounts. Contact
your bank if the reversal does not appear within 7 business days.
9. GST & Tax Invoices
GST invoices are available for all orders. Business customers can provide their GSTIN at checkout
to receive a business invoice. Tax invoices can be downloaded from the 'Returns & Orders' section
under 'Invoice'.

testCases.name: test_case_4
testCases.input: What is the minimum purchase amount required to use EMI on ShopEasy?
testCases.actualOutput: The minimum purchase amount required to use EMI on ShopEasy is Rs. 3,000 for eligible credit and debit cards.
testCases.expectedOutput: EMI is available on purchases above Rs. 3,000 for eligible credit and debit cards. EMI tenure options range from 3 to 24 months depending on the bank and card type.
retrievalContext:
[Source: Payments and Pricing Policy]
3. EMI Options
EMI is available on purchases above ■3,000 for eligible credit and debit cards. No-cost EMI is
available on select products where the interest amount is discounted upfront by the seller or
ShopEasy. EMI tenure options range from 3 to 24 months depending on the bank and card type.

[Source: Payments and Pricing Policy]
1. Accepted Payment Methods
ShopEasy supports a wide range of payment methods to ensure convenience for all customers:
Payment Type
Details
Credit Cards
Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Diners Club, RuPay
Debit Cards
All major Indian bank debit cards supported
Net Banking
50+ major Indian banks supported
UPI
All UPI-enabled apps: GPay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM, etc.
ShopEasy Pay
ShopEasy Pay balance, ShopEasy Pay ICICI credit card
EMI
No-cost EMI and standard EMI via credit/debit cards and Bajaj Finserv
Buy Now Pay Later
ShopEasy Pay Later — instant credit up to ■60,000
Cash on Delivery
Available for eligible orders and pin codes
Gift Cards

[Source: Payments and Pricing Policy]
4. ShopEasy Pay Later
ShopEasy Pay Later allows eligible customers to purchase now and pay later with flexible
repayment options:
 Instant credit limit up to ■60,000 based on creditworthiness.
 Pay next month or in 3/6/9/12 monthly instalments.
 Zero interest for next-month repayment.
 Managed through the ShopEasy app under 'ShopEasy Pay Later' section.
 Late payment fees apply if repayment is not made by the due date.

testCases.name: test_case_6
testCases.input: How do I recover my ShopEasy account password?
testCases.actualOutput: To recover your ShopEasy account password, please visit the login page and click on the "Forgot Password?" link. Follow the prompts to reset your password using your registered email address or mobile number. If you need further assistance, feel free to contact ShopEasy Customer Support at 1800-3000-9009 or through the Help page on ShopEasy.in.
testCases.expectedOutput: To recover your ShopEasy password, click 'Forgot your password?' on the sign-in page. An OTP will be sent to your registered email or mobile number. Passwords must be at least 8 characters and include a mix of letters and numbers. Reset links expire within 15 minutes of issuance.
retrievalContext:
[Source: Account Management Policy]
1. Account Creation
To create an ShopEasy account, you must provide a valid email address or mobile number and set
a password. You must be at least 18 years of age or have parental/guardian consent to create an
account. One person may not maintain multiple accounts; duplicate accounts may be merged or
suspended.

[Source: Account Management Policy]
8. Customer Support
For account-related assistance, contact ShopEasy Customer Support via:
 Phone: 1800-3000-9009 (toll-free, 24/7).
 Chat: Available on the ShopEasy.in Help page.
 Email: Via the 'Contact Us' form in the Help section.
 ShopEasy App: 'Help & Customer Service' in the main menu.

[Source: Account Management Policy]
6. Account Deletion
To request account deletion, navigate to 'Account & Lists' > 'Account' > 'Close Your ShopEasy
Account'. Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. All order history, wish lists, reviews,
and saved data will be permanently removed. Active orders must be completed or cancelled before
deletion is processed.

testCases.name: test_case_7
testCases.input: What happens to my data when I delete my ShopEasy account?
testCases.actualOutput: When you delete your ShopEasy account, all your order history, wish lists, reviews, and saved data will be permanently removed. This action is irreversible, so please ensure that you have completed or cancelled any active orders before proceeding with the deletion.
testCases.expectedOutput: Account deletion on ShopEasy is permanent and cannot be undone. All order history, wish lists, reviews, and saved data will be permanently removed. Active orders must be completed or cancelled before deletion is processed.

To request account deletion, navigate to 'Account & Lists' > 'Account' > 'Close Your ShopEasy
Account'. Account deletion is permanent and cannot be undone. All order history, wish lists, reviews,
and saved data will be permanently removed. Active orders must be completed or cancelled before
deletion is processed.

[Source: Account Management Policy]
7. Data Privacy
ShopEasy is committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the Information
Technology Act, 2000 and applicable data protection regulations. Customer data is used solely to
provide and improve ShopEasy services. Data is never sold to third parties. For full details, refer to
ShopEasy's Privacy Notice available on the website.

[Source: Account Management Policy]
5. Account Suspension & Termination
ShopEasy reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate its terms of service.
Common reasons include:
 Fraudulent activity or misuse of return/refund policies.
 Providing false information during account creation.
 Multiple accounts created to abuse promotional offers.
 Chargebacks filed without valid basis.
 Violation of ShopEasy's Community Guidelines.

testCases.name: test_case_8
testCases.input: What warranty does a ShopEasy Renewed product come with?
testCases.actualOutput: A ShopEasy Renewed product comes with a minimum 90-day supplier-backed warranty or ShopEasy Renewed Guarantee.
testCases.expectedOutput: ShopEasy Renewed products come with a minimum 90-day supplier-backed warranty or the ShopEasy Renewed Guarantee. If the product does not work as expected, ShopEasy offers a replacement or refund within 90 days.
retrievalContext:
[Source: Product Condition and Listing Guidelines]
3. ShopEasy Renewed Program
ShopEasy Renewed products are professionally refurbished, pre-owned products that have been
inspected and tested to work and look like new. Key features of the program include:
 Minimum 90-day supplier-backed warranty or ShopEasy Renewed Guarantee.
 Products tested by qualified suppliers with a minimum 90-day warranty.
 Products include all relevant accessories.
 If the product does not work as expected, ShopEasy offers a replacement or refund within 90
days.

[Source: Product Condition and Listing Guidelines]
5. A-to-Z Guarantee
The ShopEasy A-to-Z Guarantee protects customers when purchasing from third-party sellers on
ShopEasy.in. Coverage includes:
 Item not received within the estimated delivery date.
 Item received is materially different from what was described.
 Item received is damaged or defective.
 Seller refuses to provide a refund or replacement for a valid return.
To file an A-to-Z Guarantee claim, go to 'Returns & Orders', select the order, and click 'File/View
Claim'. Claims must be filed within 90 days of the maximum estimated delivery date.

[Source: Returns and Refunds Policy]
1. Overview
ShopEasy offers a hassle-free returns and refunds program designed to ensure complete customer
satisfaction. This policy applies to all items purchased directly from ShopEasy.in or from third-party
sellers fulfilled by ShopEasy (SFE). Items sold and fulfilled by third-party sellers may have separate
return policies.

testCases.name: test_case_9
testCases.input: What are my rights if I receive a ShopEasy item that doesn't match its listed condition?
testCases.actualOutput:
If you receive an item from ShopEasy that doesn't match its listed condition, you are entitled to:

- A full refund, including return shipping costs.
- A free replacement of the same item.
- An A-to-Z Guarantee claim if the seller is unresponsive.
- Escalation to ShopEasy's specialist team for complex cases.

If you need further assistance, feel free to ask!
testCases.expectedOutput: If you receive an item that does not match its listed condition, you are entitled to a full refund including return shipping costs, a free replacement of the same item, an A-to-Z Guarantee claim if the seller is unresponsive, or escalation to ShopEasy's specialist team for complex cases.

 Escalation to ShopEasy's specialist team for complex cases.

[Source: Product Condition and Listing Guidelines]

ShopEasy.in. Coverage includes:
 Item not received within the estimated delivery date.
 Item received is materially different from what was described.
 Item received is damaged or defective.
 Seller refuses to provide a refund or replacement for a valid return.
To file an A-to-Z Guarantee claim, go to 'Returns & Orders', select the order, and click 'File/View
Claim'. Claims must be filed within 90 days of the maximum estimated delivery date.

[Source: Product Condition and Listing Guidelines]

exactly what they expect. This document defines condition categories, listing standards, and
customer rights related to product condition.
